name: Enhanced Arcane Focus
desc: While holding this item, a creature gains a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, the creature ignores half cover when making a spell attack.

name: Enhanced Defense
desc: A suit of armor or a shield you touch gains a +1 bonus to Armor Class. The bonus increases to +2 when you reach 10th level in this class.

name: Enhanced Weapon
desc: This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The bonus increases to +2 when you reach 10th level in this class.

name: Repeating Shot
item_type: simple or martial weapon with the ammunition property (requires attunement)
desc:
This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it when it's used to make a ranged attack, and it ignores the loading property if it has it.

If you load no ammunition in the weapon, it produces its own, automatically creating one piece of magic ammunition when you make a ranged attack with it. The ammunition created by the weapon vanishes the instant after it hits or misses a target.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Bag of Holding)
desc: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions, roughly 2 feet in diameter at the mouth and 4 feet deep. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. The bag weighs 15 pounds, regardless of its contents. Retrieving an item from the bag requires an action.

name: Homunculus Servant
item_type: A gem or crystal worth at least 100 gp
desc: You learn how to create a homunculus servant. The homunculus is a special companion that can assist you in and out of combat.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Alchemy Jug)
desc: This ceramic jug appears to be able to hold a gallon of liquid and weighs 12 pounds whether full or empty. You can use an action and name one liquid from the table below to cause the jug to produce the chosen liquid. Afterward, you can uncork the jug and pour out the liquid, up to 2 gallons per minute.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Cap of Water Breathing)
desc: While wearing this cap underwater, you can speak its command word as an action to create a bubble of air around your head. It allows you to breathe underwater for up to 1 hour.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Rope of Climbing)
desc: This 60-foot length of silk rope weighs 3 pounds and can hold up to 3,000 pounds. If you hold one end of the rope and use an action to speak the command word, the rope animates. As a bonus action, you can command the rope to move on its own up to 20 feet.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Wand of Magic Detection)
desc: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges, and if a magical effect is within 30 feet of you, the wand pulses and points to the one nearest to you. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Goggles of Night)
desc: While wearing these dark lenses, you have darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. If you already have darkvision, wearing the goggles increases its range by 60 feet.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Sending Stones)
desc: You receive two stones. While you hold one stone, you can use an action to cast the sending spell from it. The target is the bearer of the other stone. If no creature bears the other stone, you know that fact as soon as you use the stone and don't cast the spell.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Wand of Secrets)
desc: The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges, and if a secret door or trap is within 30 feet of you, the wand pulses and points to the one nearest to you. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Mind Sharpener
item_type: A suit of armor or a set of robes
desc: The infused item has 4 charges. When the wearer fails a Constitution saving throw to maintain concentration on a spell, they can use their reaction to expend 1 charge to succeed instead. The item regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Returning Weapon
item_type: A simple or martial weapon with the thrown property
desc: This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it, and it returns to the wielder's hand immediately after it is used to make a ranged attack.

name: Resistant Armor
desc: While wearing this armor, a creature has resistance to one of the following damage types, which you choose when you infuse the item: acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, radiant, or thunder.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Boots of Elvenkind)
desc: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound, regardless of the surface you are moving across. You also have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks that rely on moving silently.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Pipes of Haunting)
desc: You must be proficient with wind instruments to use these pipes. They have 3 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge to create an eerie, spellbinding tune. Each creature within 30 feet of you that can hear you must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened of you for 1 minute.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Gauntlets of Ogre Power)
desc: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect on you if your Strength is already 19 or higher.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Cloak of Elvenkind)
desc: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide, as the cloak's color shifts to camouflage you.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Cloak of the Manta Ray)
desc: While wearing this cloak with its hood up, you can breathe underwater and gain a swimming speed of 60 feet.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Eyes of Charming)
desc: These crystal lenses have 3 charges. You can expend 1 charge to cast charm person (save DC 13). The lenses regain all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Gloves of Thievery)
desc: These gloves are invisible while worn and grant a +5 bonus to Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks and lockpicking checks.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Lantern of Revealing)
desc: While lit, this hooded lantern reveals invisible creatures and objects within 30 feet in bright light.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Ring of Water Walking)
desc: While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

name: Radiant Weapon
item_type: A simple or martial weapon (requires attunement)
desc: This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, the wielder can take a bonus action to cause it to shed bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. The wielder can use a reaction to blind an attacker until the end of the attacker's next turn.

name: Spell-Refueling Ring
desc: While wearing this ring, the creature can recover one expended spell slot as an action. The spell slot can be of 3rd level or lower. Once used, the ring can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Helm of Awareness
desc: While wearing this helmet, a creature has advantage on initiative rolls. In addition, the wearer can't be surprised, provided it isn't incapacitated.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Boots of Striding and Springing)
desc: While you wear these boots, your walking speed becomes 30 feet unless your speed is already higher, and your jump distance is tripled.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Boots of the Winterlands)
desc: These furred boots let you ignore difficult terrain created by ice or snow, tolerate extreme cold, and gain resistance to cold damage.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Brooch of Shielding)
desc: While wearing this brooch, you have resistance to force damage and immunity to damage from the magic missile spell.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Cloak of Protection)
desc: While wearing this cloak, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Eyes of the Eagle)
desc: While wearing these lenses, you have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Gloves of Missile Snaring)
desc: These gloves improve your ability to catch and reduce damage from ranged weapon attacks.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Gloves of Swimming and Climbing)
desc: While wearing these gloves, you gain a swimming speed and climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Hat of Disguise)
desc: While wearing this hat, you can cast disguise self from it at will.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Headband of Intellect)
desc: Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Helm of Telepathy)
desc: While wearing this helm, you can use telepathy and cast detect thoughts.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Medallion of Thoughts)
desc: While wearing this medallion, you can cast detect thoughts with charges that refresh at dawn.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Necklace of Adaptation)
desc: While wearing this necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment and gain advantage against harmful gases and vapors.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Periapt of Wound Closure)
desc: While wearing this periapt, you stabilize automatically at the start of your turn while dying, and Hit Dice healing is doubled.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Pipes of the Sewers)
desc: You can use these pipes to summon and control swarms of rats.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Quiver of Ehlonna)
desc: This quiver has multiple extradimensional compartments that can hold ammunition and similar long objects.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Ring of Jumping)
desc: While wearing this ring, you can cast jump on yourself at will.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Ring of Mind Shielding)
desc: While wearing this ring, your thoughts can't be read by telepathy or magic unless you allow it.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Slippers of Spider Climbing)
desc: While wearing these slippers, you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, with your hands free.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Amulet of Health)
desc: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this amulet. It has no effect on you if your Constitution is already 19 or higher.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Belt of Hill Giant Strength)
desc: Your Strength score is 21 while you wear this belt. It has no effect on you if your Strength is already 21 or higher.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Bracers of Archery)
desc: While wearing these bracers, you have proficiency with the longbow and shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls on ranged attacks made with such weapons.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Winged Boots)
desc: While you wear these boots, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can use the boots to fly for up to 4 hours, all at once or in several shorter flights, each one using a minimum of 1 minute from the duration. If you are flying when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 feet per round until you land.

name: Arcane Propulsion Armor
desc:
The wearer of this armor gains these benefits:
• The wearer's Strength score is 18, unless it is already higher.
• The armor has gauntlets that are magic melee weapons, with which the wearer is proficient. They deal 1d8 force damage on a hit.
• The armor has integrated boots that give a flying speed of 5 feet, allowing the wearer to hover. The wearer can't be knocked prone against their will.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Boots of Levitation)
desc: While wearing these boots, you can cast levitate on yourself at will.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Boots of Speed)
desc: As a bonus action, you can click the boots' heels together to double your walking speed and impose disadvantage on opportunity attacks against you.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Bracers of Defense)
desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no shield.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Cloak of the Bat)
desc: While wearing this cloak in dim light or darkness, you can fly and gain stealth benefits, and it can transform into a bat.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Dimensional Shackles)
desc: These shackles restrain a creature and prevent teleportation or interplanar travel until removed.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Gem of Seeing)
desc: This gem has 3 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to gain truesight out to 120 feet for 10 minutes.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Horn of Blasting)
desc: You can use this horn to emit a destructive blast in a 30-foot cone. The horn has a chance to explode when used.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Ring of Free Action)
desc: While wearing this ring, difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement, and magic can neither reduce your speed nor cause paralysis or restraint.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Ring of Protection)
desc: While wearing this ring, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Replicate Magic Item (Ring of the Ram)
desc: This ring has charges that you can expend to make a ranged force attack that can push creatures and objects.

name: Armor of Magical Strength
desc: While wearing this armor, you can use your Intelligence modifier in place of your Strength modifier when making Strength checks and Strength saving throws.

name: Boots of the Winding Path
desc: While wearing these boots, you can teleport up to 15 feet as a bonus action to an unoccupied space you can see. You must have occupied that space at some point during the current turn.
